source_policy.license_note: External Archive images are referenced by URL only. Do not commit or redistribute source images without a separate license review.
source_policy.identity_note: Use as a loose visual reference for a fictional avatar, not as a direct likeness recreation.

visual_reference_notes.source: Derived from the provided external image URLs for avatar art direction only.
high_level_appearance: dark thick medium-length hair with natural volume
straight nose, fuller lower face, and neutral-to-focused expression
rugged but not heavily aged face
beard_definition: short dark connected mustache and beard
mustache connects into the beard at the mouth corners
denser growth around chin and jawline
trimmed natural beard, not long, not clean-shaven, no goatee-only style
clothing_reference: red and black plaid hooded flannel or overshirt
avoid: Do not recreate the exact person, exact scene, or exact photo crop.
Do not include copyrighted shirt graphics or readable brand/text details unless separately licensed.
Do not include watermarks, news overlays, or Archive UI.
Do not infer personal details not present in the source images.

avatar_generation_guidance.preferred_reference_mode: Use broad hair, beard, clothing, and build cues for a new fictional character.
metahuman_notes: Create a realistic young adult male with dark medium-length hair and a short connected full beard.
Use red/black plaid outerwear, a gray T-shirt, and red backpack straps for clothing recreation.
Keep the final generated avatar clearly production-created and fictional.
